=========
Braceless
=========

def main : IO UInt32 := do
  IO.println "hello"
  IO.println "world"

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    body: (do
      (application
        name: (projection
          term: (identifier)
          name: (identifier))
        arguments: (string))
      (application
        name: (projection
          term: (identifier)
          name: (identifier))
        arguments: (string)))))

========
Repeated
========

def main : IO UInt32 := do do
  IO.println "hello"
  IO.println "world"

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    body: (do
      (do
        (application
          name: (projection
            term: (identifier)
            name: (identifier))
          arguments: (string))
        (application
          name: (projection
            term: (identifier)
            name: (identifier))
          arguments: (string))))))

==========
Let (Bind)
==========

def f : Unit := do
  let c <- 2
  let d ← 2
  let e := 2

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (identifier)
    body: (do
      (let_bind
        name: (identifier)
        value: (number))
      (let_bind
        name: (identifier)
        value: (number))
      (let
        name: (identifier)
        value: (number)))))

=============
Let Annotated
=============

def f : Unit := do
  let e : Nat := 2

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (identifier)
    body: (do
      (let
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier)
        value: (number)))))

===========
Let Mutable
===========

def bar : Unit := do
  let mut s := 0

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (identifier)
    body: (do
      (let_mut
        name: (identifier)
        value: (number)))))

========
For Loop
========

def foo (xs : Array Nat) : Unit := do
  let mut s := 0
  for x in xs do
    s := s + x

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (identifier))))
    type: (identifier)
    body: (do
      (let_mut
        name: (identifier)
        value: (number))
      (for_in
        var: (identifier)
        iterable: (identifier)
        body: (do
          (reassign
            name: (identifier)
            value: (binary_expression
              left: (identifier)
              right: (identifier))))))))

================================
For Loop With Destructuring Bind
================================

def foo (xs : Array (Nat × Nat)) : Unit := do
  for ⟨x, y⟩ in xs do
    panic! "foo"

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    (binders
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (parenthesized
            (binary_expression
              (identifier)
              (identifier))))))
    type: (identifier)
    body: (do
      (for_in
        (anonymous_constructor
          (identifier)
          (identifier))
        iterable: (identifier)
        body: (do
          (application
            name: (identifier)
            arguments: (string)))))))

======
Return
======

def f : Nat := do
  return 3

---

(module
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (identifier)
    (do
      (do_return
        (number)))))

===============
Return One Line
===============

#check (do return PUnit.unit : PUnit)

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (parenthesized
      (do
        (do_return
          value: (projection
            term: (identifier)
            name: (identifier))))
      type: (identifier))))

==============
Return Nothing
==============

def f : Unit := do
  return

---

(module
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (identifier)
    (do
      (do_return))))

======
Unless
======

def check : IO Unit := do
  unless true do
    println! "Bla"

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    body: (do
      (application
        name: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (true))
        arguments: (do
          (application
            name: (identifier)
            arguments: (string)))))))
